summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was provided or invented; hydrated open PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer review. No GitHub mutations are planned. Items missing from the compacted preflight artifact are scoped needs_human because live target_updated_at/kind evidence was unavailable.
